query: SELECT g.id as gestorId, g.userId, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.openId FROM gestores g LEFT JOIN users u ON g.userId = u.id WHERE u.name IN ('Monica Correia', 'Carlos Eduardo', 'Marco Amorim', 'Marco Vilar', 'Fabio Dias', 'Rui Adrião') OR u.name LIKE '%Monica%' OR u.name LIKE '%Carlos Eduardo%' OR u.name LIKE '%Marco Amorim%' OR u.name LIKE '%Marco Vilar%' OR u.name LIKE '%Fabio%' OR u.name LIKE '%Rui Adri%' ORDER BY u.name;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2rEtBRZHWZUfGJS.3b07a01772f8 --database 3c9MozLH35e233uWy5WDtH --execute SELECT g.id as gestorId, g.userId, u.name, u.email, u.role, u.openId FROM gestores g LEFT JOIN users u ON g.userId = u.id WHERE u.name IN ('Monica Correia', 'Carlos Eduardo', 'Marco Amorim', 'Marco Vilar', 'Fabio Dias', 'Rui Adrião') OR u.name LIKE '%Monica%' OR u.name LIKE '%Carlos Eduardo%' OR u.name LIKE '%Marco Amorim%' OR u.name LIKE '%Marco Vilar%' OR u.name LIKE '%Fabio%' OR u.name LIKE '%Rui Adri%' ORDER BY u.name;
